title: artifact summary schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for a compact result for user display. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityBridge.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

artifactType.description: Type of artifact (file, schema, trace, etc.).

fingerprint.description: Hash or fingerprint of the artifact contents.

conformanceSummary.description: Summary of conformance checks or status.

redactionState.description: Redaction or privacy state of the artifact (e.g. none, redacted).
